abstract: Best practices and API reference for the Terra Lab Reports API (pre-release): converting clinical lab report PDFs and images into structured, standardized biomarker data with canonical slugs, UCUM unit codes, and LOINC codes. Covers the async upload/standardize/deliver lifecycle, webhook and polling delivery, the Session to Results to Reference Ranges data model, null-biomarker handling, snowflake IDs, and idempotent event processing.
